meta.title: Never see the same question twice
meta.description: LearnForge is your AI Memory Guardian — dynamic question reformulation, Bloom's Taxonomy depth tracking, and science-backed spaced repetition.

hero.hook: Never see the same question twice.
hero.subtitle: Traditional flashcards make you memorize the card. LearnForge makes you understand the concept — with AI-powered reformulation, cognitive depth tracking, and science-backed scheduling.

problem.title: The Recognition Trap
problem.lead: After seeing the same card enough times, your brain takes a shortcut. You recognize the layout instead of recalling the concept. You feel confident — until the exam phrases it differently.

card1.title: Same question, every time
card1.description: Traditional flashcard apps show you the identical card on every review. Your brain memorizes the visual pattern, not the knowledge.

card2.title: Stuck at surface level
card2.description: Can you recite the definition? Great. Can you apply it? Analyze it? Most tools never ask — they stop at 'do you remember?'

card3.title: One size fits nobody
card3.description: The same format, the same difficulty, the same question type. No adaptation to how deeply you actually understand each concept.

solution.title: Your AI Memory Guardian
solution.lead: LearnForge sits between you and the forgetting curve. It knows what you know, how deeply you know it, and asks exactly the right question to make sure nothing slips away.

point1.title: Dynamic reformulation
point1.description: Every review phrases the question differently. Different angle, different format. You can't fake understanding by recognizing a card layout.

point2.title: Cognitive depth tracking
point2.description: Six levels of understanding per concept — from basic recall to critical thinking. The system automatically escalates as you prove mastery.

point3.title: Science-backed scheduling
point3.description: FSRS algorithm with modality-aware intervals. Harder study modes earn longer breaks. Every review is optimally timed for your memory.

features.title: Built for deep learning
features.subtitle: Every feature exists because the science says it works.

card1.title: Dynamic Question Reformulation
card1.description: AI rephrases every question on every review. Same concept, fresh perspective. The recognition trap becomes impossible.

card2.title: Bloom's Taxonomy Progression
card2.description: Track six levels of understanding per concept. Graduate from 'what is it?' to 'what would you do with it?' — automatically.

card3.title: FSRS Spaced Repetition
card3.description: The latest scheduling algorithm adapts to your individual memory patterns. No ease factor hell, no one-size-fits-all intervals.

card4.title: AI-Native Card Creation
card4.description: Create cards through natural conversation. KaTeX formulas, SVG diagrams, interactive quizzes — all generated from what you tell the AI.

step1.title: Talk to your AI tutor
step1.description: Connect LearnForge to Claude via MCP. Tell it what you want to learn — it creates interactive flashcards with formulas, diagrams, and quizzes.

step2.title: Study your way
step2.description: Review in the web app or via AI chat. Choose classic self-rating, multiple choice, or open questions. Harder modes earn longer intervals.

step3.title: Master every concept
step3.description: Watch your understanding deepen through Bloom's levels. FSRS schedules your reviews at optimal intervals. Nothing slips away.

bloom.title: Six levels of understanding
bloom.subtitle: Traditional flashcards stop at level 1. LearnForge takes you to level 6.

pricing.title: Start learning today
pricing.claudeNote: Works with any Claude plan, including the free tier (1 connector included).
pricing.donation: Love LearnForge? Help keep it independent.

seo.orgDescription: Open-source AI-powered spaced repetition platform with dynamic question reformulation and Bloom's Taxonomy depth tracking.

faq.a1: LearnForge is an open-source learning platform that uses AI to dynamically reformulate flashcard questions on every review, tracks cognitive depth using Bloom's Taxonomy, and schedules reviews with the FSRS spaced repetition algorithm.
faq.q2: How is LearnForge different from Anki or other flashcard apps?
faq.a2: Traditional flashcard apps show you the same question every time, leading to pattern recognition instead of true understanding. LearnForge rephrases every question using AI and tracks six levels of cognitive depth per concept — from basic recall to critical thinking.
faq.a3: LearnForge offers a 30-day free trial with full access. After that, it costs €2/month billed annually. Self-hosting is always free under the AGPL-3.0 license.
faq.a4: Bloom's Taxonomy is a framework of six cognitive levels: Remember, Understand, Apply, Analyze, Evaluate, and Create. LearnForge tracks your mastery at each level and automatically escalates question difficulty as you improve.
